title: RayTPA
description: The ultimate TPA and Home system featuring professional GUIs, cinematic animations, /back death retrieval, and hex-color support. Fully optimized for Paper 1.21+.
body:
# ⚡ RayTPA
### The Modern Standard for Teleportation.
**Powered by Ray Industries**

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-blue?style=for-the-badge) ![Paper](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paper-1.21+-green?style=for-the-badge) ![RayIndustries](https://img.shields.io/badge/Powered%20By-Ray%20Industries-orange?style=for-the-badge)

---

## 📖 About
**RayTPA** is a high-performance, aesthetically pleasing teleportation suite designed for modern Minecraft servers. Unlike old plugins, RayTPA is built natively for **Paper 1.21+** using the latest Java 21 features, ensuring zero lag and maximum stability.

It features a **Cinematic Experience**—from particle animations during teleportation to beautiful MiniMessage gradients in chat.

## ✨ Key Features
* **🖥️ GUI Menus:** View active TPA requests and saved Homes in a sleek GUI.
* **🎨 Modern Visuals:** Full Hex/RGB color support, gradients, and Title/Subtitle timers.
* **💫 Animations:** Spiral particle effects wrap around players while they wait to teleport.
* **💀 /back System:** Automatically saves death locations with a clickable "Go Back" chat button.
* **📍 Advanced Request System:**
    * `/tpa` - Request to go to a player.
    * `/tpahere` - Request a player to come to you.
    * `/tpahereall` - Request EVERYONE to come to you.
* **💾 Database Support:** SQLite (default) built-in. Optimized for speed.
* **⚙️ Fully Configurable:** Customize every message, sound, timer, and particle effect.

---

## 🛠️ Commands & Permissions

| Command | Permission | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/tpa <player>` | `raytpa.tpa` | Send a teleport request to a player. |
| `/tpahere <player>` | `raytpa.tpahere` | Ask a player to teleport to YOU. |
| `/tpahereall` | `raytpa.tpahereall` | Ask all players to teleport to YOU. |
| `/tpaaccept` | `raytpa.tpa` | Accept a pending request. |
| `/tpadeny` | `raytpa.tpa` | Deny a pending request. |
| `/sethome <name>` | `raytpa.sethome` | Save your current location as a home. |
| `/home <name>` | `raytpa.home` | Teleport to a saved home. |
| `/homegui` | `raytpa.homegui` | Open the Home selection menu. |
| `/back` | `raytpa.back` | Return to your last death location. |

**Admin Permission:** `raytpa.admin` (Bypasses cooldowns and gives access to all features).

---

## 📥 Installation
1.  Download **RayTPA.jar**.
2.  Drop it into your server's `plugins` folder.
3.  Restart your server.
4.  Edit `config.yml` and `messages.yml` to match your server's theme (optional).
5.  Enjoy!

---

### 📧 Support
If you find any bugs or have feature requests, please report them on our discord server.

**Plugin by Ray | Powered by Ray Industries**
